methods.name: AllButLast(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<T>)
methods.summary: Given a generic enumerable collection of items, returns all but the last item in the collection

returns.doc: new collection of all except the last item in the input collection

methods.name: Permute(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable<T>, int)
methods.summary: Returns an enumeration of enumerators, one for each permutation of the input. E.g. given an input array: {A, B, C, D, E}, and count of 2, this returns the following permutations in the same order: { AB, AC, AD, AE, BC, BD, BE, CD, CE, DE }

params.name: list
params.doc: input collection to choose permutations from

params.name: count
params.doc: Number of items to return permutations of

returns.doc: All possible permuatations of the input list picking (count) items at a time
